findings.description: business_days_between counts weekdays by materializing day_range's full list of every date in the span (O(N) time AND O(N) space) when a closed-form weeks*5+endpoint-correction formula gives the same answer in O(1); on a web endpoint with untrusted dates, a multi-century span forces tens of thousands of throwaway date allocations per call.

day_range returns a fully-materialized list[date] rather than streaming; its only in-scope consumer (business_days_between) iterates once and discards it, so an internal generator helper would avoid the allocation -- though the public list[date] contract is arguably intentional API surface, so the real fix is in the caller.
